dialogues.cn: 距离上次见到我的夫君大人已经六年了 学士
dialogues.en: It's been near six years since I last saw my lord husband, Maester.

dialogues.cn: 我必须得知道……他能活下来吗？
dialogues.en: I must know... will he live?

dialogues.cn: 他带领船员们冲上一艘伪装过的破船
dialogues.en: He led his sailors into an ambush.
A ship made to look as if it were abandoned.

dialogues.cn: 在战斗中 他被海盗用匕首划伤了脖子
dialogues.en: In the fighting, his neck was slashed by a corsair's dagger.
He fell overboard into the sea.
The wound was severe.
Much blood was lost.

dialogues.cn: 但更令人担忧的是随之而来的高烧
dialogues.en: But the greater concern is the fever that followed.

dialogues.cn: 随船学士说他是从身体内部烧起来的
dialogues.en: The ship's maester said he burns from within.
The ravens came in from?
Evenfall, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 暮临厅地处风暴地的塔斯岛上，位于风息堡以东，在龙石岛和潮头岛的南方
看来他们会在三天后抵达
dialogues.en: So they arrive in three days.

dialogues.cn: 做好一切准备等他回来 凯尔温学士
dialogues.en: Let all be made ready to receive him, Maester Kelvyn.
The Sea Snake is strong.
No doubt.

dialogues.cn: 但有些死于血热病人 年纪只有他一半 我就见过
dialogues.en: And yet, I have seen blood fever overcome men half his age.

dialogues.cn: 不要在我们家乌鸦嘴 魏蒙德
dialogues.en: I will not suffer the talk of crows in my house, Vaemond.
I love my brother...
but we must be honest with ourselves.

dialogues.cn: 等我们接到船 他可能已经不在了
dialogues.en: We may greet his ship to find him gone.

dialogues.cn: 那由谁来坐上浮木王座呢？
dialogues.en: And who will take the Driftwood Throne?

dialogues.cn: 我外婆正坐得很舒服呢
dialogues.en: My grandmother seems quite comfortable here.

dialogues.cn: 只有她丈夫不在的时候 她才能代行职责
dialogues.en: She presides only in the absence of her husband.

dialogues.cn: 如果我哥哥死了 这个位置就该传下去
dialogues.en: On his death, the seat passes.

dialogues.cn: 传给路斯里斯·瓦列利安
dialogues.en: To Lucerys Velaryon.
As is my lord husband's desire.
I am the Sea Snake's own blood,

dialogues.cn: 我是他在世上最亲的家人
dialogues.en: the closest kin he has left.

dialogues.cn: 注意你的发言 小叔
dialogues.en: Be careful, good-brother.

dialogues.cn: 要是被人听到 可是叛国之罪
dialogues.en: One could take your words for treason.

dialogues.cn: 我只是说句实话 雷妮丝
dialogues.en: I speak the truth, Rhaenys.
And you know it.
The matter has been decided.

dialogues.cn: 可正是做出这个决定的人
dialogues.en: By a man whose ambition

dialogues.cn: 他的野心给我们家族带来了一次又一次的灾难
dialogues.en: has brought down on us calamity after calamity.

dialogues.cn: 我哥哥只在意史书怎么记载
dialogues.en: My brother cares only for the history books.

dialogues.cn: 但瓦列利安家族的血脉呢？
dialogues.en: But what of the Velaryon line?
Is it to be snuffed out,

dialogues.cn: 就该被斯壮家的狗崽子们取代吗？
dialogues.en: supplanted by the pups of House Strong?

dialogues.cn: 潮头岛于情于理都应归我所有
dialogues.en: Driftmark is mine by all rights.
And while I should like your support,
I do not... need it.
The winds have shifted.

dialogues.cn: 朝廷有充分的理由支持我
dialogues.en: The crown has good reason to take my side.

dialogues.cn: 我的国王堂弟会为这个拔了你的舌头
dialogues.en: My cousin the King would have your tongue for this.

dialogues.cn: 但而今坐在铁王座上的已经不是国王了 嫂子
dialogues.en: But it's not a king who sits the Iron Throne these days, good-sister.
It's a queen.

dialogues.cn: 征服者和他的姐妹率领一支强大的军队航行
dialogues.en: The Conqueror and his sisters sailed with a great army.
Se Blākuata Rāsho drāñot vilinio viārtis.
And landed at the Blackwater Rush.
Drāñot.
Drāñot. Drāñot.
Drāñot. At the end?
The mouth.

dialogues.cn: 河口！加油啊 小杰 你明明知道的
dialogues.en: Mouth! Come on, Jace, you knew that.
Drāñot. Drāñot.
Drāñot vilinio viārtis.
Drāñot.
Drāñot. Come on, Jace.

dialogues.cn: 我看今天早上就到这吧
dialogues.en: Perhaps that's enough for this morning.

dialogues.cn: 不 不 我想继续
dialogues.en: No, no. I want to keep going.
Maester.
Guēsi misenakson Aegon ūndas.
Aegon... ordered that the trees should be...
...killed.
Felled.
It is a related word.

dialogues.cn: 我没打算让你一天就学会高等瓦雷利亚语 小杰
dialogues.en: I don't expect you to learn High Valyrian in a day, Jace.

dialogues.cn: 国王应当以祖先的传统为荣
dialogues.en: A king should honor the traditions of his forbears.

dialogues.cn: 不过……除非你正打算要废黜自己的母亲
dialogues.en: Well... unless you're planning to depose your own mother,

dialogues.cn: 否则你学习的时间还多着呢
dialogues.en: you have plenty of time to study.
Leave us.
Joffrey... come.

dialogues.cn: 他是在质疑小路的合法身份
dialogues.en: He means to call into question Luke's legitimacy.
And by extension Jace,

dialogues.cn: 最终质疑我对铁王座的继承权
dialogues.en: and by extension my own claim to the throne.

dialogues.cn: 魏蒙德只关心潮头岛和瓦列利安的血脉
dialogues.en: Vaemond cares only about Driftmark and the Velaryon line.
Not about our politics.

dialogues.cn: 他和奥托·海塔尔达成共识了吗？
dialogues.en: Has he made common cause with Otto Hightower yet?
This is what I fear.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮丝已经飞去宫里了
dialogues.en: Rhaenys has flown to court.

dialogues.cn: 当然 她不可能支持他
dialogues.en: Surely, she cannot be planning to back him.

dialogues.cn: 不会的 无论我们之间有什么分歧
dialogues.en: No. Whatever disagreements we may have had,
she's not cruel...

dialogues.cn: - 也不会蠢到那么做 - 分歧？
dialogues.en: -or stupid enough to do that. -Disagreements?

dialogues.cn: 她认定我们为了结婚害死了她的儿子
dialogues.en: She believes we had her son killed so that we might marry.

dialogues.cn: 是的……但她仍然亲手养大了贝妮拉
dialogues.en: Yes... and yet, she's taken Baela to ward.

dialogues.cn: 对 但这是为了兰娜尔 她对咱俩没感情
dialogues.en: Yes. It is Laena's memory she honors. She has no love for us.

dialogues.cn: 毒蛇的毒液已经蔓延这么远了吗？
dialogues.en: Has the vipers' venom spread so far?

dialogues.cn: 那些毒蛇正以我父亲的名义统治国家
dialogues.en: Those vipers rule in my father's name.
And my father--

dialogues.cn: 我还有什么选择的余地？
dialogues.en: What choice do I have?
To King's Landing, then.

dialogues.cn: 欢迎坦格利安家族的雷妮拉
dialogues.en: All hail Rhaenyra of House Targaryen,

dialogues.cn: 龙石岛公主 铁王座继承人
dialogues.en: Princess of Dragonstone and heir to the Iron Throne

dialogues.cn: 以及他的王夫 戴蒙·坦格利安王子
dialogues.en: and her royal consort, Prince Daemon Targaryen.

dialogues.cn: 欢迎回家 公主殿下
dialogues.en: Welcome back, Princess.
Lord Caswell.

dialogues.cn: 我本想说回家真好 但我几乎认不出这里了
dialogues.en: I would say it's nice to be home, but I scarcely recognize it.

dialogues.cn: 自打石阶列岛的问题解决以来
dialogues.en: We have continued to enjoy improved customs duties

dialogues.cn: 我们从增长的关税中持续获益
dialogues.en: since the settling of the Stepstones.

dialogues.cn: 至于我们能加以利用的份额
dialogues.en: And the extent to which we exploit those

dialogues.cn: 取决于港口总管的收入
dialogues.en: is contingent on the harbor master's receipts.

dialogues.cn: 关于这个事 呃 那个 修士们再度请求
dialogues.en: Of which, um, uh, the, uh, septons have requested
half that again for a bronze bust

dialogues.cn: 为圣母节定……定制一座青铜半身像
dialogues.en: they wish to co--commission for the, the Festival of the Mother,

dialogues.cn: 那个 我并不建议批准
dialogues.en: which I would not recommend.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢您的详尽说明 毕斯柏里大人
dialogues.en: Thank you for that exhaustive accounting, Lord Beesbury.
I remind you--

dialogues.cn: 您的客人到了 陛下
dialogues.en: Your guests have arrived, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 依照您的指示 我相信他们得到了
dialogues.en: I trust they've been welcomed as befits their station.

dialogues.cn: 和身份相称的接待 首相大人
dialogues.en: As you instructed, Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 据我所知 科利斯大人希望他的孙子路斯里斯
dialogues.en: It was my understanding Lord Corlys wished for his grandson Lucerys
to succeed him as Lord of the Tides.

dialogues.cn: 那孩子长到现在 一多半时间都离潮头岛很远
dialogues.en: The boy has been raised most of his life away from Driftmark.

dialogues.cn: 确实 他能驾驭龙 但他能指挥舰队吗？
dialogues.en: He can fly a dragon, yes, but can he command a fleet?

dialogues.cn: 能力不影响他的继承权
dialogues.en: Ability does not alter his claim.

dialogues.cn: 海蛇从未为了以防万一
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake has never formally named him as heir,
if it comes to that.

dialogues.cn: 朝廷必须做出对国家最好的选择
dialogues.en: The crown must choose what is best for the realm.

dialogues.cn: 他可是兰尼诺的儿子 有什么根据——
dialogues.en: He is Laenor's son. What grounds could there be--

dialogues.cn: 就是有什么 毕斯柏里大人
dialogues.en: What indeed, Lord Beesbury.
What indeed.

dialogues.cn: 明日 我们将听取雷妮拉公主
dialogues.en: We shall hear Princess Rhaenyra's petition,

dialogues.cn: 以及其他诉求者的陈情
dialogues.en: along with those of the other claimants on the morrow.

dialogues.cn: - 但—— - 请见谅 各位大人
dialogues.en: -But-- -I do beg your pardon, my lords.

dialogues.cn: 我得去和客人们打个招呼
dialogues.en: I must greet our guests.

dialogues.cn: 我们要对出售新羊毛征税吗？
dialogues.en: Shall we levy a tax on the sale of new wool?
Your Grace...
a matter has arisen that requires your attention.

dialogues.cn: 亚历克爵士 无论是什么 都得等等再说
dialogues.en: Whatever it is, Ser Arryk, it'll need to wait.

dialogues.cn: - 我是伊利克 陛下 - 当然 抱歉 爵士
dialogues.en: -I'm Erryk, Your Grace. -Of course. My apologies, ser.
It's about the Prince.

dialogues.cn: 他房里的突发状况 非常棘手
dialogues.en: There's been a delicate situation in his apartments.
Father?
-Who goes there? -Father.
It's me, my King.
Rhaenyra.
Oh...
I'm here with Daemon.
Daemon?
Daemon?
Daemon.
Help me up.
Oh...
It has been so long.

dialogues.cn: 海蛇在石阶列岛打仗 受了重伤
dialogues.en: The Sea Snake has taken a grave wound in battle in the Stepstones.
When?

dialogues.cn: 我们好多年前就赢了啊
dialogues.en: We won that war years ago.
No.
The Triarchy is resurgent.
The fighting is anew.
And there is a p--

dialogues.cn: 有人陈情 要求裁定潮头岛继承权
dialogues.en: There is a petition to decide upon the succession of Driftmark

dialogues.cn: 以及浮木王座的继承人
dialogues.en: and the heir to the Driftwood Throne.
Petitions?

dialogues.cn: 阿莉森和奥托……现在是他们说了算
dialogues.en: Alicent and Otto... they see to all that business now.

dialogues.cn: 不 哥哥 听我说
dialogues.en: No, brother, listen to me.
You are to affirm your position for Lucerys

dialogues.cn: 让路斯里斯成为科利斯·瓦列利安的继承人
dialogues.en: to be Corlys Velaryon's successor.

dialogues.cn: 科利斯伯爵出什么事了吗？
dialogues.en: Has something happened to Lord Corlys?
Father...

dialogues.cn: 有两个人 我们想让您见见
dialogues.en: there's someone we wish to introduce you to.
Daemon.
Brother.
Who is that?
Father...
this is Aegon.
Aegon.
And this... is Viserys.
Ah... Viserys.

dialogues.cn: 这个名字很有王者风范
dialogues.en: Now that is a name fit for a king.
Oh...
Oh, oh...
Oh, I'm sorry.
Oh, I'm sorry. I'm sorry.
I'm so--
I'm sorry. I'm sor--
Please.
My tea. My tea.
What tea? This?
Yes. Yes.
Yes.

dialogues.cn: 我第一时间把她带来了
dialogues.en: I brought her here immediately.

dialogues.cn: 没人看见 王后陛下
dialogues.en: She's seen no one else, Your Grace.
Come here, sweetling.
Tell me your name.

dialogues.cn: 我叫黛安娜 王后陛下
dialogues.en: It's Dyana, Your Grace.
If it please you.

dialogues.cn: 黛安娜 多美的名字
dialogues.en: Dyana. What a pretty name.
I understand you've found yourself in some trouble.
I was fetching the Prince his wine,

dialogues.cn: 我把酒放在他的桌子上 当我转身时——
dialogues.en: and I put it on his table, and when I turned--
I didn't see him.

dialogues.cn: 我请求他停下 陛下
dialogues.en: I asked him to stop, Your Grace.
I did, truly...
you must believe me.

dialogues.cn: 谢谢你告诉我 黛安娜
dialogues.en: Thank you for telling me, Dyana.

dialogues.cn: - 我知道这不是你的过错 - 嗯？
dialogues.en: -I know it wasn't your fault. -Hm?
I believe you.
Y-You do?
I do.
But what I worry about...
is what others might believe.

dialogues.cn: 你当时和王子独处一室 是吗？
dialogues.en: You were alone with the Prince, were you not?
Yes, I--

dialogues.cn: 没人看见你们俩之间发生了什么
dialogues.en: And no one else saw what happened between the two of you.

dialogues.cn: 如果其他人听说这件事——
dialogues.en: If anyone else were to hear about this--

dialogues.cn: - 我没有跟任何人说 - 你告诉了伊利克爵士 塔雅还有我
dialogues.en: -I haven't told anyone. -You told Ser Erryk and Talya and now me.

dialogues.cn: 虽然我相信不是你的错 但其他人可能不会那么相信
dialogues.en: And though I believe you are not to blame, others might not be so trusting.

dialogues.cn: 他们可能认为你是想败坏王子的名声 或者更糟的是……
dialogues.en: They might think you were trying to besmirch the Prince, or worse...

dialogues.cn: 从一开始就是你勾引了他
dialogues.en: that you're the sort of girl that might have enticed him in the first place.

dialogues.cn: 你知道这样的女孩会有怎样的下场
dialogues.en: And you know what happens to girls like that.

dialogues.cn: 我一定守口如瓶只字不提 陛下
dialogues.en: I wouldn't dream of breathing another word to anyone, Your Grace.
I swear it on my life.
I know you won't.
For your troubles.
The tea, Your Grace.
It's best to be certain.
Get up.
Aegon!
Get up!
Mother?
What is it?
"What is it? What is it?"

dialogues.cn: “什么事？”你就只会说这一句话？
dialogues.en: "What is it?" That's all you can say for yourself?
Has something happened?
Dyana.
The serving girl.

dialogues.cn: 哦 看在诸神的份上
dialogues.en: Oh, for the gods' sake.

dialogues.cn: 那个女孩 伊耿 从你身边跑掉的
dialogues.en: The girl, Aegon. The one you sent fleeing from your company.
Oh, it was just harmless fun.

dialogues.cn: 没什么大不了 她犯不着生气
dialogues.en: She didn't need to go and get upset about it.

dialogues.cn: 想想这给你的妻子和我带来的耻辱
dialogues.en: Think of the shame on your wife, on me.
How can you keep carrying on like this,

dialogues.cn: 尤其是在今天这样的日子？
dialogues.en: especially on a day like today?

dialogues.cn: 怎么了？今天是什么日子？
dialogues.en: Why? What is it today?
You are no son of mine.
I did not ask for this.

dialogues.cn: 我做了你要求我做的一切
dialogues.en: I've done everything you've asked me to,
and I try so...

dialogues.cn: 我这样努力 但是你和父亲从不满意
dialogues.en: I try so hard, but it will never be enough for you or father.

dialogues.cn: 你看见黛安娜了吗？ 她本该给孩子们穿衣服的
dialogues.en: Have you seen Dyana? She's supposed to dress the children.

dialogues.cn: 他看起来像是变了一个人
dialogues.en: He looks like a different person.

dialogues.cn: 我认为我们应该再咨询一下格拉底斯学士
dialogues.en: I believe we should also consult Maester Gerardys.

dialogues.cn: 如果他能看看国王 也许会给点不同的建议——
dialogues.en: Perhaps if he could see the King, he'd suggest a different--
Princess Rhaenyra.
And Prince Daemon.

dialogues.cn: 好久不见 大驾光临 我们万分荣幸
dialogues.en: It has been so long since we were granted the joy of your presence.

dialogues.cn: 的确如此 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Indeed, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 但也没久到值得隆重欢迎的程度
dialogues.en: Though not long enough to merit a greeting upon our arrival.

dialogues.cn: 我敢肯定王后有要务在身 亲爱的
dialogues.en: I'm sure the Queen had pressing business, my love.

dialogues.cn: 治理国家的事 我们俩又懂什么呢？
dialogues.en: What can either of us know of ruling a kingdom?

dialogues.cn: 你们很清楚 不是我在治理
dialogues.en: I do not rule, as you well know.

dialogues.cn: 我和我父亲只不过是服务于国王的意志和智慧
dialogues.en: My father and I are mere stewards of the King's will and wisdom.

dialogues.cn: 那么国王陛下到底是如何表达智慧的？
dialogues.en: And how exactly is that wisdom expressed?
In blinks and wheezes?

dialogues.cn: 他要是还能记住自己的名字 我都要大吃一惊
dialogues.en: I'd be surprised if he could remember his own name.

dialogues.cn: - 要是你能记住也行 - 自从上次会面之后
dialogues.en: -Or if you could. -King Viserys's condition

dialogues.cn: 韦塞里斯陛下的状况日渐恶化
dialogues.en: has worsened since you saw him last.
It subjects him to considerable pain.

dialogues.cn: - 按照学士们的建议—— - 啊 学士们
dialogues.en: -On the advice of the maesters-- -Ah, the maesters.

dialogues.cn: 当然 就是他们让他……
dialogues.en: Of course. It is they who keep him...

dialogues.cn: 迷上了罂粟花奶 好叫海塔尔们帮他暖王座
dialogues.en: addled on milk of the poppy while the Hightowers warm his throne.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉 你是没见过他离开罂粟花奶 痛到不省人事的样子
dialogues.en: Rhaenyra, if you would see him without it, almost blind with suffering.

dialogues.cn: 阿莉森 我毫不怀疑 你这样做纯粹是出于仁慈
dialogues.en: Alicent, I have no doubt it was an act of the purest mercy,

dialogues.cn: 不过告诉我 如果是为了减轻国王的痛苦
dialogues.en: but tell me, for the King's suffering,

dialogues.cn: 学士们难道也开了方子 要求去掉坦格利安纹章
dialogues.en: did the maesters also prescribe the removal of Targaryen heraldry

dialogues.cn: 换上各种雕像和七芒星图案？
dialogues.en: and the installation in its stead of various statues and stars?

dialogues.cn: 七神徽章只是为了在未知的道路上引领我们
dialogues.en: The emblems of the Seven serve only to guide us on an uncertain path.

dialogues.cn: - 提醒我们世间还有更高的权威 - 那么明天
dialogues.en: -To remind us of a higher authority. -And on the morrow,

dialogues.cn: 又是哪位权威将会裁断我儿子对自己遗产的所有权？
dialogues.en: which authority will sit in judgment of my son's claim on his own inheritance?
That would be mine... and the Hand's.

dialogues.cn: 但请放心 天父是公正的
dialogues.en: But be assured, the Father is just and commands me

dialogues.cn: 他命令我忘记你今天在这间屋子里提出的控诉
dialogues.en: to forget the accusations you have hurled in this room today.

dialogues.cn: - 比我记忆中要小 - 和我记忆中完全一样
dialogues.en: -Smaller than I remember. -It looks exactly the same.
Luke, come on.

dialogues.cn: 看见了吗？我就说肯定还在
dialogues.en: See? I told you this would still be here.

dialogues.cn: 那时候你以为能挥动克里斯顿的流星锤
dialogues.en: And you thought you could swing Criston's morningstar.

dialogues.cn: 结果差点搞得脑袋搬家
dialogues.en: And you almost took your own head off.

dialogues.cn: - 你怎么了？- 人人都在盯着我们
dialogues.en: -What's your problem? -Everyone's staring at us.

dialogues.cn: 没有人会质疑我是潮头岛的继承人……
dialogues.en: No one would question me being heir to Driftmark...
if...

dialogues.cn: 假如我看起来更像兰尼诺·瓦列利安爵士 而不是哈尔温·斯壮爵士
dialogues.en: if I looked more like Ser Laenor Velaryon than Ser Harwin Strong.
It doesn't matter what they think.
Well done, my Prince.

dialogues.cn: 你很快就会在比武大会上获胜
dialogues.en: You'll be winning tourneys in no time.
I don't give a shit about tourneys.
Nephews...
have you come to train?
Open the gate!

dialogues.cn: 保持镇定 王后陛下
dialogues.en: Hold your nerve, my Queen.

dialogues.cn: 我们所做的一切都是为了王国的利益
dialogues.en: What we do, we do for the good of the realm.

dialogues.cn: 必须承认 眼下这事让我非常不安
dialogues.en: I must confess a certain uneasiness now this is at hand.

dialogues.cn: - 他可能还活着 - 但如果他已经不在了 我们必须有所准备
dialogues.en: -He may yet live. -But we must be prepared if he does not.

dialogues.cn: 归功于杰赫里斯和韦塞里斯的治理
dialogues.en: The realm has enjoyed a long peace,

dialogues.cn: 王国已经享有很长一段时间的安定和平
dialogues.en: a credit to the work of both Jaehaerys and Viserys,

dialogues.cn: 但战争的威胁迫在眉睫 随时会抵达我们的海岸
dialogues.en: but the threat of war looms and may arrive on our shores.

dialogues.cn: 如果战争真的来了 你会想要一个孩子来指挥
dialogues.en: When it does, will you want a child at the command

dialogues.cn: 维斯特洛最强大的舰队吗？
dialogues.en: of the greatest fleet in Westeros?

dialogues.cn: 当然了 我们的所作所为
dialogues.en: We must, of course...
act in the interest of our subjects.

dialogues.cn: 王后陛下 下一任潮汐之主会知恩图报的
dialogues.en: The next Lord of the Tides will be deeply in your debt, Your Grace.
As will Driftmark...
in all its strength.
Grandmother?
Rhaena.

dialogues.cn: 贝妮拉说你可能在这里
dialogues.en: Baela said you might be here.
She's done well as your ward.
You've...um...
raised her admirably.
You honor me, Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我能和公主单独聊几句吗 雷妮亚？
dialogues.en: Might I speak to the Princess alone, Rhaena?
Princess.

dialogues.cn: 我想了很久 你来这儿的目的是什么
dialogues.en: I wondered for many an hour what your purpose was in coming here.

dialogues.cn: 关于魏蒙德爵士的控诉 你到底是站在哪边
dialogues.en: Whether you'd speak for or against the suit brought by Ser Vaemond.
But then, I realized...
you intend to advocate for yourself.
This is no fair proceeding.

dialogues.cn: 我打赌这是王后和首相设下的圈套
dialogues.en: It is a trap set by the Queen and the Hand, I'd wager,

dialogues.cn: 他们想借此宣告我的儿子是私生子
dialogues.en: to proclaim my son illegitimate.

dialogues.cn: 但你对兰尼诺的所作所为更加恶劣
dialogues.en: Yet you did worse than that with Laenor.
Did you not?
I loved your son.

dialogues.cn: 你可能不相信 但我真的爱他
dialogues.en: You may not believe it to be true, but I did.
I did not order his death.

dialogues.cn: 也没有参与谋划 我可以发誓
dialogues.en: Nor was I complicit in it. I swear this to you.
I'll make you an offer.
Back Luke's claim,

dialogues.cn: 同时让兰娜尔的两个女儿和我的两个儿子订婚
dialogues.en: and let us betroth Laena's children to mine.

dialogues.cn: 贝妮拉将会成为七大王国的王后
dialogues.en: Baela will be Queen of the Seven Kingdoms

dialogues.cn: 她的子嗣将会成为铁王座的继承人
dialogues.en: and her sons will be heirs to the throne.
Rhaena will rule in Driftmark, and

dialogues.cn: 以后再由她和路斯里斯的孩子继承爵位
dialogues.en: the seat will pass to her and Lucerys's children in time.
A generous offer.

dialogues.cn: - 或者说是绝望的提议  - 重要吗?
dialogues.en: -Or a desperate one. -What does it matter?
You are right in this, at least.
It does not matter.
You can bargain with me all you like.

dialogues.cn: 或是把孙女带过来想让我心软
dialogues.en: Bring my granddaughter with you to soften my resolve.

dialogues.cn: 但是明天 海塔尔家族会率先出击
dialogues.en: But tomorrow, the Hightowers land their first blow.
They force you to your knees...
and I must stand alone.
Alicent?
Alicent...

dialogues.cn: 父亲 是我 雷妮拉
dialogues.en: No, it's Rhaenyra, father.
Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 冰与火之歌 您相信它会成真吗?
dialogues.en: "The Song of Ice and Fire." Do you believe it to be true?
Aegon's Dream.
You told me

dialogues.cn: 团结整个王国 对抗共同的敌人 是我们的职责
dialogues.en: it was our duty to hold the realm united against a common foe.

dialogues.cn: 您立我为继承人 却导致王国走向分裂
dialogues.en: By naming me heir, you divided the realm.
I thought I wanted it.
But the burden is a heavy one.
It's too heavy.
My...
My only child.

dialogues.cn: 如果您想要我担起重任 那就支持我
dialogues.en: If you wish me to bear it, then defend me.
And my children.
It's...

dialogues.cn: 给我准备晚餐 奥托
dialogues.en: I want to have supper, Otto.

dialogues.cn: - 现在是早上了 陛下  - 今晚
dialogues.en: -It is the morning, Your Grace. -Tonight.
The whole of my family
are gathered at the Red Keep.

dialogues.cn: 我希望……我们能一起吃顿饭
dialogues.en: I want us... to dine together.
Bring milk of the poppy.
No.
Just arrange the supper.
Though it is the great hope of this court

dialogues.cn: 科利斯·瓦列利安大人能够平安归来
dialogues.en: that Lord Corlys Velaryon survive his wounds,

dialogues.cn: 但我们聚集在此 有着更加沉重的任务
dialogues.en: we gather here with the grim task

dialogues.cn: 那就是解决潮头岛的继承人问题
dialogues.en: of dealing with the succession of Driftmark.

dialogues.cn: 作为首相 我代表国王就此事
dialogues.en: As Hand, I speak with the King's voice on this
and all other matters.

dialogues.cn: 朝廷现在开始听取陈情
dialogues.en: The crown will now hear the petitions.

dialogues.cn: 瓦列利安家族的魏蒙德爵士
dialogues.en: Ser Vaemond of House Velaryon.
My Queen.
My Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 我们家族的历史可以从七大王国
dialogues.en: The history of our noble houses extends beyond the Seven Kingdoms

dialogues.cn: 一直追溯到古瓦雷利亚时代
dialogues.en: to the days of Old Valyria.

dialogues.cn: 坦格利安家族一直统治着天空
dialogues.en: For as long as House Targaryen has ruled the skies,

dialogues.cn: 正如瓦列利安家族统治着海洋
dialogues.en: House Velaryon has ruled the seas.

dialogues.cn: 瓦雷利亚末日浩劫之后 我们两个家族成为最后的幸存者
dialogues.en: When the Doom fell on Valyria, our houses became the last of their kind.

dialogues.cn: 我们的祖先来到这片全新的土地 他们知道如果失败
dialogues.en: Our forebearers came to this new land, knowing that were they to fail,

dialogues.cn: 将意味着血脉和姓氏的终结
dialogues.en: it would mean the end to their bloodlines and their name.

dialogues.cn: 我这辈子 都在潮头岛坚定捍卫哥哥的统治
dialogues.en: I have spent my entire life on Driftmark defending my brother's seat.

dialogues.cn: 我是科利斯大人的至亲 我们血脉同源
dialogues.en: I am Lord Corlys's closest kin, his own blood.

dialogues.cn: 我的血管里流淌着真正的 不容置疑的瓦列利安之血
dialogues.en: The true, unimpeachable blood of House Velaryon runs through my veins.

dialogues.cn: 我的儿子们也是如此 他们是兰尼诺·瓦列利安的孩子
dialogues.en: As it does in my sons, the offspring of Laenor Velaryon.

dialogues.cn: 如果你真的在意家族血脉 魏蒙德爵士
dialogues.en: If you cared so much about your house's blood, Ser Vaemond,

dialogues.cn: 你就不该如此大胆 妄图取代家族的合法继承人
dialogues.en: you would not be so bold as to supplant its rightful heir.

dialogues.cn: 你的说辞不过是为了个人利益和野心
dialogues.en: No, you only speak for yourself and for your own ambition.

dialogues.cn: 稍候会有机会让你表达诉求 雷妮拉公主
dialogues.en: You will have chance to make your own petition, Princess Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 请尊重魏蒙德爵士 听完他的发言
dialogues.en: Do Ser Vaemond the courtesy of allowing his to be heard.

dialogues.cn: 公主 你对瓦列利安的血脉了解多少?
dialogues.en: What do you know of Velaryon blood, Princess?

dialogues.cn: 就算我割开血管让你看看
dialogues.en: I could cut my veins and show it to you
and you still wouldn't recognize it.

dialogues.cn: 此事关乎我们家族的未来和存亡 与你无关
dialogues.en: This is about the future and survival of my house, not yours.

dialogues.cn: 王后陛下 首相大人
dialogues.en: My Queen, my Lord Hand.

dialogues.cn: 这是血脉传承的问题 无关野心
dialogues.en: This is a matter of blood, not ambition.

dialogues.cn: 我把家族存亡和血脉延续置于一切之上
dialogues.en: I place the continuation of the survival of my house and my line above all.

dialogues.cn: 我谦卑地向各位提名自己
dialogues.en: I humbly put myself before you as my brother's successor...

dialogues.cn: 作为我的兄长 潮头岛伯爵 潮汛之主的继承人
dialogues.en: the Lord of Driftmark and Lord of the Tides.

dialogues.cn: 感谢你的发言 魏蒙德爵士
dialogues.en: Thank you, Ser Vaemond.

dialogues.cn: 雷妮拉公主 现在可以为你的儿子路斯里斯·瓦列利安发言了
dialogues.en: Princess Rhaenyra, you may now speak for your son, Lucerys Velaryon.

dialogues.cn: 如果面对这场闹剧 我还非得说点什么
dialogues.en: If I am to grace this farce with some answer,

dialogues.cn: 那我首先要提醒各位 大约二十年前 就在这个——
dialogues.en: I will start by reminding the court that nearly 20 years ago, in this very--
King Viserys of House Targaryen,
the First of His Name,

dialogues.cn: 安达尔人 洛伊拿人
dialogues.en: King of the Andals, and the Rhoynar,
and the First Men,

dialogues.cn: 七国统治者暨全境守护者 驾到！
dialogues.en: Lord of the Seven Kingdoms, and Protector of the Realm.
I will sit the throne today.
Your Grace.
I will be fine. I will be fine.
I said I'm fine.
-Ah... -Come on.
Steady.
I must... admit... my confusion.
I do not understand

dialogues.cn: 继承人早已定下 还要陈什么情
dialogues.en: why petitions are being heard over a settled succession.
The only one present...

dialogues.cn: 真正了解科利斯大人意愿的人
dialogues.en: who might offer keener insight into Lord Corlys's wishes
is the Princess Rhaenys.
Indeed, Your Grace.

dialogues.cn: 我丈夫一直都希望潮头岛
dialogues.en: It was ever my husband's will that Driftmark
pass through Ser Laenor
to his trueborn son...

dialogues.cn: 也就是路斯里斯·瓦列利安
dialogues.en: Lucerys Velaryon.
His mind never changed.

dialogues.cn: 我对他的支持也从未改变
dialogues.en: Nor did my support of him.

dialogues.cn: 事实上 雷妮拉公主刚刚向我表达了她的意愿
dialogues.en: As a matter of fact, the Princess Rhaenyra has just informed me of her desire

dialogues.cn: 她希望她的儿子 小杰和小路
dialogues.en: to marry her sons Jace and Luke

dialogues.cn: 与科利斯大人的外孙女 贝妮拉和雷妮亚订下婚约
dialogues.en: to Lord Corlys's granddaughters, Baela and Rhaena.

dialogues.cn: 我真心实意赞同这门亲事
dialogues.en: A proposal to which I heartily agree.
Well... the matter is settled.
Again.

dialogues.cn: 确立瓦列利安家族的路斯里斯王子
dialogues.en: I hereby reaffirm Prince Lucerys of House Velaryon

dialogues.cn: 为潮头岛和浮木王座的继承人
dialogues.en: as heir to Driftmark,
the Driftwood Throne, and the next Lord of the Tides.
You break law...

dialogues.cn: 破坏了延续几个世纪的传统
dialogues.en: and centuries of tradition
to install your daughter as heir.
Yet you dare tell me...

dialogues.cn: 谁有资格做瓦列利安的继承人
dialogues.en: who deserves to inherit the name Velaryon.
No.
I will not allow it.
"Allow it"?

dialogues.cn: 别忘了你的身份 魏蒙德
dialogues.en: Do not forget yourself, Vaemond.

dialogues.cn: 他不是真正的瓦列利安族人
dialogues.en: That is no true Velaryon,
and certainly no nephew of mine.

dialogues.cn: 退下吧 你说得够多了
dialogues.en: Go to your chambers. You have said enough.

dialogues.cn: 路斯里斯是我的亲生外孙
dialogues.en: Lucerys is my true-born grandson.
And you...

dialogues.cn: 只不过是潮头岛的次子而已
dialogues.en: are no more than the second son of Driftmark.

dialogues.cn: 你……可以随意安排你的家族
dialogues.en: You... may run your house as you see fit...

dialogues.cn: 但是你不能决定我家族的未来
dialogues.en: but you will not decide the future of mine.

dialogues.cn: 我的家族从末日浩劫中幸存
dialogues.en: My house survived the Doom
and a thousand tribulations besides.
And gods be damned...

dialogues.cn: 我绝不会看着我的家族灭亡于这个——
dialogues.en: I will not see it ended on the account of this--
Say it.
Her children...
are bastards!
And she...
is...
a whore.
will have your tongue for that.
He can keep his tongue.

dialogues.cn: - 拿下他的武器！- 不必了
dialogues.en: -Disarm him! -No need.
-Call the maesters! -Father?

dialogues.cn: 求你了亲爱的 你得喝点什么来止痛
dialogues.en: Please, my love. You must take something for the pain.
I will not cloud my mind.
I must put things right.

dialogues.cn: 遗体明日即可启程送回潮头岛了 夫人
dialogues.en: The body will be ready for its return to Driftmark on the morrow, my lady.

dialogues.cn: 您可以让静默姐妹自己完成工作
dialogues.en: You may wish to leave the Silent Sisters to their work.
It is ill luck to look upon the face of death.

dialogues.cn: 我已经数不清见过陌客多少次了 大学士
dialogues.en: The Stranger has visited me more times than I can count, Grand Maester.
I assure you...

dialogues.cn: 他其实根本不在乎我是睁眼还是闭眼
dialogues.en: he cares little whether my eyes are open or closed.

dialogues.cn: 今晚见到你们……齐聚一堂……
dialogues.en: How good it is... to see you all tonight...
together.
-Prayer before we begin? -Yes.

dialogues.cn: 愿圣母慈爱的目光 欢笑着注视我们齐聚一堂
dialogues.en: May the Mother smile down on this gathering with love.

dialogues.cn: 愿铁匠修补我们断裂已久的纽带
dialogues.en: May the Smith mend the bonds that have been broken for far too long.

dialogues.cn: 至于魏蒙德·瓦列利安 愿诸神赐予他安息
dialogues.en: And to Vaemond Velaryon, may the gods give him rest.

dialogues.cn: 今天也是个值得庆祝的时刻
dialogues.en: This is an occasion for celebration, it seems.

dialogues.cn: 我的外孙们 小杰和小路
dialogues.en: My grandsons, Jace and Luke,

dialogues.cn: 会迎娶他们的表亲 贝妮拉与雷妮亚
dialogues.en: will marry their cousins, Baela and Rhaena,

dialogues.cn: 这使我们的家族血脉更加紧密相连
dialogues.en: further strengthening the bond between our houses.
A toast to the young Princes...

dialogues.cn: - 与他们的未婚妻 - 干杯 干杯！
dialogues.en: -and their betrothed. -Hear, hear!

dialogues.cn: 不错啊小杰 你终于能睡女人了
dialogues.en: Well done, Jace. You'll finally get to lie with a woman.

dialogues.cn: 让我们敬路斯里斯王子……
dialogues.en: Let us toast as well Prince Lucerys...
the future Lord of the Tides.
Hear, hear.
You'll be great.

dialogues.cn: 我猜 你知道那事儿该怎么干 对吧？
dialogues.en: You do know how the act is done, I assume?
At least in principle?

dialogues.cn: 该把鸡巴放哪儿啊啥的
dialogues.en: Where to put your cock and all that.
Let it be, cousin.

dialogues.cn: 你要想扮演弄臣 那随意 但在我未婚妻面前最好管住你的嘴
dialogues.en: You can play the jester if you wish, but hold your tongue before my betrothed.
It both gladdens my heart
and fills me with sorrow

dialogues.cn: 只因见到你们齐聚于此
dialogues.en: to see these faces around the table.

dialogues.cn: 你们都是我在这个世界上最亲近的人……
dialogues.en: The faces most dear to me in all the world...

dialogues.cn: 但在过去的多年中 你们彼此却……
dialogues.en: yet grown so distant from each other...

dialogues.cn: 渐行渐远 充满隔阂
dialogues.en: in the years past.
My own face...
is no longer a handsome one...

dialogues.cn: 如果以前还算英俊的话
dialogues.en: if indeed it ever was.
But tonight...

dialogues.cn: 我希望你们看到的是我……我本人
dialogues.en: I wish you to see me... as I am.
Not just a king...
but your father.
Your brother.
Your husband...
and your grandsire.
Who may not, it seems...
walk for much longer among you.

dialogues.cn: 让我们心中不要再充满恶意
dialogues.en: Let us no longer hold ill feelings in our hearts.

dialogues.cn: 若龙王家族内部分崩离析
dialogues.en: The crown cannot stand strong
if the House of the Dragon remains divided.
But set aside your grievances.
if not for the sake of the crown...
then for the sake of this old man
who loves you all
so dearly.
I wish to raise my cup to Her Grace, the Queen.
I love my father.

dialogues.cn: 但我得承认 没人能像……
dialogues.en: But I must admit that no one has stood...

dialogues.cn: 他身旁的妻子那样对他忠诚
dialogues.en: more loyally by his side than his good wife.
She has tended to him with...

dialogues.cn: 用始终如一的奉献精神
dialogues.en: unfailing devotion,
love, and honor.

dialogues.cn: 为此 我对她心怀感激……
dialogues.en: And for that, she has my gratitude...
and my apology.

dialogues.cn: 你的宽厚让我动容 公主
dialogues.en: Your graciousness moves me deeply, Princess.
We are both mothers...
and we love our children.

dialogues.cn: 即使有时不愿承认 但我们其实有很多共同点
dialogues.en: We have more in common than we sometimes allow.
I raise my cup to you and to your house.
You will make a fine queen.

dialogues.cn: 我为你即将忍受的失望而感到遗憾
dialogues.en: I regret the disappointment you are soon to suffer.

dialogues.cn: 但如果你想感受一下真正的满足
dialogues.en: But if you ever wish to know what it is to be well satisfied,
all you have to do is ask.
Jace.
To Prince Aegon and Prince Aemond.
We have not seen each other in years,

dialogues.cn: 但年少时一起成长的时光我记忆犹新
dialogues.en: but I have fond memories of our shared youth.

dialogues.cn: 作为男人 希望我们可以既是朋友 又是同盟
dialogues.en: And as men, I hope we may yet be friends and allies.

dialogues.cn: 愿你和你的家庭健康常在 亲爱的舅舅们
dialogues.en: To you and your family's good health, dear uncles.
To you as well.

dialogues.cn: 且牢记 木板底 凶兽起
dialogues.en: Beware the beast beneath the boards.
Well done, my boy.

dialogues.cn: 我想敬贝妮拉和雷妮亚
dialogues.en: I would like to toast to Baela and Rhaena.
They'll be married soon.

dialogues.cn: 其实没那么糟 大多数时间他只是无视你而已……
dialogues.en: It isn't so bad. Mostly he just ignores you...
except sometimes when he's drunk.
-Good. -Let us have some music.
Excuse me.
Guards.
Please, sit down.
Final tribute.

dialogues.cn: 愿我的外甥们身体健康
dialogues.en: To the health of my nephews:
Jace...
Luke...
and Joffrey.

dialogues.cn: 愿他们每一位都英俊 智慧……
dialogues.en: Each of them handsome, wise...
-strong. -Aemond.
Come...

dialogues.cn: 让我们干杯 为三个……
dialogues.en: let us drain our cups to these three...

dialogues.cn: - 如斯强壮的男孩们 - 你敢再说一次
dialogues.en: -Strong boys. -I dare you to say that again.

dialogues.cn: 怎么了？不过是一句恭维罢了
dialogues.en: Why? 'Twas only a compliment.
Do you not think yourself Strong?
-Jace! -That is enough!

dialogues.cn: 你干嘛当着这么多人的面说这些？
dialogues.en: Why would you say such a thing before these people?

dialogues.cn: 我只是表达一下对家族的自豪罢了 母亲
dialogues.en: I was merely expressing how proud I am of my family, Mother.

dialogues.cn: 但好像我的外甥们对自己的家族没有那么多自豪感啊
dialogues.en: Mm, though it seems my nephews aren't quite as proud of theirs.
Wait, wait!

dialogues.cn: 回你们房间去 所有人 立刻
dialogues.en: Go to your quarters. All of you go, now.
Rhaenyra.

dialogues.cn: 我觉得 我们最好还是先回龙石岛吧
dialogues.en: It's best, I think, if we go back to Dragonstone.
You've only just arrived.
Let me see the children home.
I'll...
return on dragonback.
The King and I would both like that.

dialogues.cn: 看样子今天的城堡之夜挺难熬啊
dialogues.en: It's been quite a night at the castle, it seems
Yes, my lady.
Come on, come on.
That's it.
Oh...
Well done.
-I'm sorry. -Shh.
-I'm sorry. -Shh, shh, shh.
But you wanted to know...
if I believe it to be true.
Believe what to be true, my King?
Don't you remember?
Aegon...
Our son?
His Dream.
The Song of Ice... and Fi--
It is true.
What he saw in the North.
The Prince That Was Promised.

dialogues.cn: 我听不懂 韦赛里斯
dialogues.en: I don't understand, Viserys.
The Prince.
Prince Aegon?
To unite the realm
against the cold... and the dark.
It is you.
You are the one.
You must do this.
You must do this.
I understand, my King.
No more.
No more.
My love.

dialogues.cn: 叙拉克斯新下了一窝蛋
dialogues.en: Syraks drōmuni arliar mādas.
Hāriar drōma.
Hāriar drōma!
Dijemiot hannēliks lōtūljās.

dialogues.cn: 马上就去 王子殿下
dialogues.en: Sīrgō, dārilaros ñuhys.
Maester kesi mādas.

dialogues.cn: 刚收到 来自潮头岛的贝妮拉小姐
dialogues.en: Sīr amastas, hen Driftmākot Ābrāzmā Baelā.

dialogues.cn: 父亲，向您禀报魏蒙德叔叔的最新动向，此刻他正驶向君临，
dialogues.en: 将要面见国王陛下，奏请继承、权利以及神圣血脉等相关事宜。 他称自己为浮木王座唯一完美的继承人选，并请求陛下恩准，依法继承。 --贝妮拉
